ai_summary: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Limited announced a Board meeting scheduled for July 28, 2026, to consider and approve its unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. In line with regulatory requirements, the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives has been closed from July 1st to July 30th, 2026, in anticipation of these results. This is a routine regulatory filing indicating an upcoming earnings release, with no material red flags.
